attr.title: Banjo-Kazooie : Recompiled
attr.desc: Banjo: Recompiled is a project that uses N64: Recompiled to statically recompile Banjo-Kazooie into a native port with many new features, enhancements, and extensive mod support.
attr.inst: Place your `Banjo-Kazooie v1.0` rom with md5 `b29599651a13f681c9923d69354bf4a3` in the `banjorecompiled` folder.
